offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate weekly cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem: inaccurate cash flow forecasts leading to financial mismanagement
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in forums for accounting tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
